file_summary: This module provides encoding/decoding utilities for the itsdangerous library, including base64 URL-safe encoding/decoding and integer-byte conversion functions. It handles string/bytes conversion and error management for data serialization.

line_windows.summary: This window covers the entire file, showing all imports and function definitions. It includes: 1) Imports of standard library modules (base64, string, struct, typing) and the local BadData exception. 2) The want_bytes helper function that converts strings to bytes with configurable encoding. 3) Base64 encoding/decoding functions (base64_encode, base64_decode) that provide URL-safe operations with padding handling and error conversion to BadData. 4) Module-level constants for base64 alphabet and struct objects for 64-bit integer packing/unpacking. 5) Integer-byte conversion functions (int_to_bytes, bytes_to_int) that use big-endian 64-bit representation with zero-byte stripping/padding.
